title: MAME quick snaps
head: 9a2971e7572cf0dbfff2dffe7131e749b4b6b641
commit_message:
snk/hng64.cpp: snk/hng64_sprite.ipp: Fixed a possible transparency issue. (#14276)

Also simplified zoom shift.
